name: anyharness
description: Prompt injection and enforcement harness for AI coding agents: skills, hooks, project rules, Git gates, and CI checks.

interface.shortDescription: Prompt injection and enforcement harness for AI coding.
interface.longDescription: Use AnyHarness to inject LLM-facing prompts into Claude, Codex, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, Cursor rules, and to enforce gates with hooks, Git hooks, CI, gate artifacts, approvals, and docs drift checks.
defaultPrompt: Inject AnyHarness core rules into this repository.
Use AnyHarness core rules for this change.
Use AnyHarness to initialize this repository and recommend the right profile.
Use AnyHarness to review this diff before commit.
